results.description: The dispute originated in Chamoli's Karnaprayag on June 16, when a group of Nihang Sikh pilgrims was accused of attacking residents with swords.

results.title: Veteran Odia Cinematographer Dillip Ray Dies at 72 in Bhubaneswar
results.description: Veteran cinematographer Dillip Ray, a luminary in Odia and Bengali cinema, passed away at 72 in Bhubaneswar after a brief illness. Celebrated for his five Odisha State Film Awards for Best Cinematography, Ray's career spanned over eight decades, contributing to more than 80 Odia films, numerous Bengali productions, and documentaries.
